text:
There once were three friends, Benny, Brainy, and Boon. They loved adventure. One day, they found an old map buried beneath the garden shed. It was a map to an imaginary kingdom called Shinydale. The map didn't say anything about where it came from. They decided they would embark on an epic expedition to find Shinydale.

First, they headed north toward the snowy mountains that were rumored to surround the kingdom. They traversed icy landscapes until finally reaching a clearing where snowflakes glittered like diamonds.

Their next journey led them through a misty forest. Every rustle sounded like the whispering spirits of ancient lore. After several hours, they stumbled upon a secret door covered in vines.

Brainy, always analyzing, suggested they coax the vines apart. After some careful pulling, the door swung open.

Inside was a grand chamber bathed in gentle light. At the far end stood a shiny fountain, reflecting dazzlingly like a thousand stars.
